subject: Joint Distributions
question: Let $X$ represent the age of an insured automobile involved in an accident. Let $Y$ represent the length of time the owner has insured the automobile at the time of the accident. $X$ and $Y$ have joint probability density function $f_{XY}(x, y) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{64}(10 - xy^2) & 2 \le x \le 10, 0 \le y \le 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ Calculate the expected age of an insured automobile involved in an accident.
